belier.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer, joining the Sun exactly in your fourth house of home and inner foundations, its light at just 1.4 percent illumination, the seed barely visible beneath the soil. This is a beginning too quiet to see yet, a moment for setting an intention about your home life or emotional roots rather than acting on one. Let the fire in you bank low and turn inward, just for today.
belier.love: A quiet, private intention about the emotional security you want to build, alone or with someone, plants itself well today. Say it softly, even just to yourself; loud declarations are not what this New Moon asks for.
belier.work: If your work touches your home life, remote arrangements, family business, domestic projects, today favors setting a gentle new intention rather than taking visible action. Let the seed sit in the dark a little longer.
belier.energy: Your fire turns fully inward today, a pilot light rather than a flame. This is not weakness but the exact energy this New Moon calls for; conserve it for what tomorrow will ask.
belier.intuition: A subtle sense of what you want your home or inner life to become arrives today, too soft yet to describe fully. Trust it without needing to explain it to anyone, including yourself.
belier.mantra: I plant my intention quietly and trust it to grow.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The New Moon lands today at 20 degrees Cancer in your third house of communication, its light nearly imperceptible at 1.4 percent illumination, and the Sun joins it exactly, marking a true beginning. This is the moment to set a quiet intention about how you want to speak and connect going forward, not to have every conversation figured out yet. Let the idea form gently rather than announcing it.
taureau.love: A soft, private hope about how you want to communicate with someone you love plants itself well today. There is no need to voice it fully yet; let it take root first.
taureau.work: Set an intention today about a communication habit, a newsletter, a pitch, a pattern of correspondence, you would like to build. Action can wait; the seed matters more right now.
taureau.energy: Your steady earth energy meets the deepest dark of the lunar cycle today, a rare stillness. Let yourself simply rest in it rather than searching for productivity.
taureau.intuition: A quiet knowing about a new way of expressing yourself is forming today, subtle and wordless. Trust it to clarify over the coming days rather than demanding it make sense immediately.
taureau.mantra: I let my new voice form quietly before I use it.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your second house of resources and values, its light almost entirely dark at 1.4 percent illumination, the Sun exactly beside it in a true joining. This is the moment to plant a quiet intention about your worth, your income, or what you truly value, not yet to act on it. Let the seed rest in the dark soil of this new beginning.
gemeaux.love: A gentle, unspoken intention about what you want to value more in your closest relationships takes root today. There is no need to explain it to anyone; let it simply exist within you for now.
gemeaux.work: Set a quiet intention today about your relationship to money or your sense of professional worth. This is not the day for a raise negotiation or a big financial move, only for the seed of a decision.
gemeaux.energy: Your usual quickness slows to something almost imperceptible today, appropriate to the darkest point of the lunar cycle. Let stillness feel like enough.
gemeaux.intuition: A subtle new understanding of your own worth is forming beneath the surface today, too soft yet to put into words. Trust its presence even without full clarity.
gemeaux.mantra: I plant a new understanding of my own worth.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The New Moon arrives today precisely in your own sign, at 20 degrees Cancer in your first house of self, joined exactly by the Sun at nearly the same degree, an unusually potent beginning that belongs to you specifically. Its light is almost entirely dark at 1.4 percent illumination, and Mercury's ongoing retrograde in your sign asks you to set this intention quietly rather than announce it. This is one of the most significant renewals of your year.
cancer.love: A deep, private intention about who you want to be in love, not what you want from someone else, but who you want to become, plants itself today. Let it stay unspoken for now; Mercury retrograde favors interior clarity over premature declaration.
cancer.work: Resist the urge to launch anything publicly today, even though this New Moon in your own sign stirs real ambition. Set the intention quietly and let Mercury's retrograde finish its work before you act on it.
cancer.energy: This New Moon in your own sign is a genuine turning point, even though its outward expression will take days to become visible. Rest fully today; you are not passive, you are gestating something real.
cancer.intuition: This is the clearest, most significant intuitive moment of your entire cycle, a New Moon exactly in your sign. Whatever quiet knowing about yourself arrives today deserves to be trusted completely, even in its inarticulate early form.
cancer.mantra: I begin again, quietly and completely, as myself.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your twelfth house of solitude and the unconscious, its light barely present at 1.4 percent illumination, the Sun exactly joined beside it. This is an unusually private beginning, one that asks for stillness rather than expression, a seed planted somewhere you cannot yet see. Let this day be genuinely quiet, even if quiet does not come naturally to you.
lion.love: An intention about emotional healing or forgiveness, something private between you and your own heart, forms today. It does not need to involve a conversation yet; let it simply exist within you.
lion.work: This is not a day for visible ambition, however much that may chafe against your nature. Set a quiet intention about your deeper purpose and let it rest, unannounced, until it is ready.
lion.energy: Your usual radiance dims to its faintest point today, a necessary and temporary eclipse of your own light. Trust that this darkness precedes real renewal, not decline.
lion.intuition: A deep, wordless sense of what you need to release or begin arrives today from somewhere beneath ordinary awareness. Trust it fully even without being able to name it yet.
lion.mantra: I trust the quiet work happening where I cannot see it.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your eleventh house of community and hope, its light nearly extinguished at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun. Mercury, your ruler, continues retrograde in Cancer within this same sector, so let today's new intention about friendship or collective goals form quietly rather than being shared yet. This is a seed, not an announcement.
vierge.love: A quiet hope about the kind of support you want from the people closest to you, partner included, plants itself today. There is no need to ask for it outright yet; let the intention settle first.
vierge.work: Set a private intention about a collaborative goal or community you want to be part of, rather than making any public move today. Mercury retrograde favors waiting until the picture is clearer.
vierge.energy: Your usual meticulous energy can rest today; this near-total darkness asks for stillness rather than refinement. Let yourself simply be, without a checklist.
vierge.intuition: A subtle new hope about belonging somewhere authentic is forming today, quiet and not yet fully shaped. Trust its presence even in its earliest, vaguest form.
vierge.mantra: I let a new hope take root before I chase it.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your tenth house of career and public life, its light almost entirely dark at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun. This is a significant, quiet beginning for your professional direction, a seed planted in darkness that will need time before it shows any visible growth. Resist announcing new career plans today; simply set the intention.
balance.love: A partner's quiet support for a new direction you are only just beginning to sense matters more today than any explanation you could offer them. Let them witness your stillness rather than your plans.
balance.work: This New Moon in your career house asks for private intention-setting, not public launch. Write down what you want your professional path to become, then let it rest unspoken for now.
balance.energy: Your usual social poise turns inward and still today, appropriate to the darkest point of the lunar month. Trust that rest itself is part of this beginning.
balance.intuition: A quiet new sense of professional direction is forming today, too early yet to explain to anyone else. Trust its presence and give it time before seeking validation.
balance.mantra: I let my new direction form before I speak it.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your ninth house of belief and distant horizons, its light nearly imperceptible at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun. This is a quiet seed of new philosophy or new direction, one that asks patience rather than immediate travel or bold declaration. Let today be about interior conviction, not outward proof.
scorpion.love: A quiet new understanding about what you believe love should feel like forms today, private and unrehearsed. There is no urgency to share it yet; let it settle first.
scorpion.work: An intention about further learning, publishing, or a longer journey plants itself today. Do not book the ticket or send the proposal yet; let the idea gestate in the dark a little longer.
scorpion.energy: Your usual intensity finds an unusually still container today, appropriate to this near-total darkness. Trust that depth does not always need to be visible to be real.
scorpion.intuition: A quiet new conviction about what is true for you is forming today, too soft yet to defend in argument. Trust it anyway; certainty will come later.
scorpion.mantra: I let a new belief form before defending it.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your eighth house of intimacy and shared resources, its light almost entirely dark at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun. This is a quiet, significant beginning around trust, shared finances, or emotional depth with another person, one that asks stillness rather than a bold move. Let the seed settle before you act on it.
sagittaire.love: A private new intention about the kind of intimacy you want to build with a partner forms today, tender and unspoken. Let it exist quietly within you before any conversation follows.
sagittaire.work: A shared financial matter benefits from private reflection today rather than negotiation. Set your intention about what fairness looks like to you, and wait before bringing it to the table.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual expansive energy contracts to something small and quiet today, matching this near-total lunar darkness. Trust the contraction; it precedes real growth.
sagittaire.intuition: A quiet new understanding about trust, yours or someone else's, is forming today beneath ordinary awareness. Trust its presence even before it becomes fully clear.
sagittaire.mantra: I let trust rebuild quietly, one seed at a time.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your seventh house of partnership, its light nearly extinguished at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun opposite your own sign. This is a quiet, significant beginning for a close relationship, business or romantic, that asks patience rather than a decisive move today. Let the intention form before you bring it to another person.
capricorne.love: A private hope about the next chapter of a close relationship plants itself today, gentle and unspoken. There is no need to declare it yet; let it root first in your own certainty.
capricorne.work: A partnership or negotiation benefits from private reflection today about what you truly want from it. Save the actual conversation for when the intention has had time to clarify.
capricorne.energy: Your usual discipline can rest today; this near-total darkness asks for receptivity rather than structure. Let yourself be still without needing to justify it.
capricorne.intuition: A quiet new understanding about what you want from a close bond is forming today, too soft yet to voice. Trust it fully even in its earliest, wordless form.
capricorne.mantra: I let this partnership begin again, quietly, from truth.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your sixth house of routine and wellbeing, its light barely present at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun, while Pluto retrograde continues its long restructuring in your own sign. This is a quiet, significant beginning for a new daily habit or health practice, one that asks patience before any visible change. Let the seed settle in the dark today.
verseau.love: A quiet intention about the daily rhythm you want to share with someone, small routines of care, forms today. There is no need to propose it yet; let it exist within you first.
verseau.work: Set a private intention today about a new habit or routine you want to build, rather than launching it publicly. The near-total darkness favors gestation over demonstration.
verseau.energy: Your usual mental restlessness quiets today, appropriate to the darkest point of the month. Trust that this stillness is doing real work, even where Pluto's restructuring cannot yet be seen.
verseau.intuition: A quiet new understanding about what your body and daily life actually need is forming today. Trust it even before you can fully explain the shift.
verseau.mantra: I let a new rhythm form quietly before I live it.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The New Moon arrives today at 20 degrees Cancer in your fifth house of creativity and romance, its light nearly entirely dark at 1.4 percent illumination, joined exactly by the Sun, a beginning made specifically for your imagination. This is the quietest, most fertile kind of start, a seed planted somewhere unseen that will need time before it shows itself as anything at all. Let today be about wonder, not output.
poissons.love: A tender, private hope about romance or creative connection with someone plants itself today. Let it exist as feeling alone for now, without needing to become a plan or a declaration.
poissons.work: A creative project benefits from private incubation today rather than any attempt to show or share it. Trust that the idea needs darkness before it needs light.
poissons.energy: Your natural sensitivity finds a rare, gentle harmony with this near-total lunar darkness today. Let yourself dream without needing the dream to make sense yet.
poissons.intuition: This New Moon speaks directly to your intuitive nature, and a genuinely new creative or emotional understanding is forming today beneath conscious thought. Trust it fully, even in silence.
poissons.mantra: I let my imagination begin again in the dark.
poissons.author: Sibylle
